tasks.title: Initiate Refund
tasks.description: The customer wants a refund for order #12345 due to a damaged item.
tasks.expected_outcome: Refund is initiated and a confirmation number is provided.

tasks.title: Verify Policy Compliance
tasks.description: The agent must check if the refund amount exceeds the $50 limit for unapproved returns.
tasks.expected_outcome: Agent identifies the limit and requests manager approval if necessary.

title: Customer Refund Automation
description: This scenario verifies that the agent can process a customer refund request while adhering to company policies.
